name: flow-07-feed-pipeline
description: T76 FeedItemGenerator + T77 FeedScorer + T78 FeedDeliveryOrchestrator — DATA_PIPELINE archetype. T77 score=0 passthrough: score node never drops items. T78 calls T81 independently of T76 result.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: score-passthrough-no-drop, T78 independent-of-T76, T81 inline in T78
Retrieve DATA_PIPELINE arch pattern for T76-T77-T78: score passthrough, independent delivery gate
Break T76-T77-T78 into: T76 generate feed items → T77 score all (never drop, score=0 is valid) → T78 call T81 independently → deliver
Generate feed-item-generator.service.ts — T77 score=0 passthrough: score node never drops items. T78 calls T81 independently of T76 result.
Named check validation: score_passthrough_no_drop, t78_independent_of_t76_result, t81_inline_in_t78
Score generated code 0-100 against T76-T77-T78 iron rules: passthrough scoring, independent gate, inline privacy
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
